---
description: 'Break Epic into User Stories'
mode: 'agent'
---

Read the provided Epic from the `specs/epics/` folder.
Create 5-7 User Stories for this Epic. Each story must pass the INVEST principles, be completable in 1-3 days, and have 3-5 specific acceptance criteria.
Format each story using the `specs/templates/story-template.md` structure.
Save the output to `specs/stories/STORY-{epic}.{number}-{name}.md`.
